positive: A minimalist and symmetrical illustration of a celestial compass wreath. The wreath is composed of stylized constellations, crescent moons, and various geometric astral shapes, rendered in crisp black ink lines on a pure white background. The overall style is modern linocut and Nordic folk art, emphasizing clean silhouettes, strong negative space, and an ethereal, cosmic elegance. The center features a stylized, open eye surrounded by small geometric planets and starbursts, creating a symmetrical, balanced focal point. Composition must be centered and scalable for apparel printing, optimized for maximum contrast and visual impact. Highly detailed line work, vector graphic quality, monochrome.
